{{Quote|Greetings, fellow sentient! I notice that you are not heavily armed… or at least, not heavily armed, enough! Please allow my self to introduce myself. I am Adum, a simple merchant with a much noble purpose!|translated=1|Adum Larp|<ref name="Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic">''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]''</ref>}}
'''Adum Larp''' was a [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] operated on [[Dantooine/Legends|Dantooine]] as a merchant during the [[Jedi Civil War]].

==Biography==
{{Quote|The settlers and noble humans of Dantooine have been plagued by kath hounds, raiders and other fearsome troubles of late. It is much, much too sad to see these things happen to such people as this. Therefore, I have made this my mission to be!|Larp to Revan|<ref name="Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic" />|translated=1}}
The [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] Adum Larp was an arms dealer and general salesman who lived on the plains east of the [[Jedi Enclave]]. He declared that it was his "mission" to provide the local settlers and farmers with the supplies that they needed to stave off attacks by [[Kath hound/Legends|kath hounds]] and the occasional [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] raiders. He was a very passionate salesman, and when asked questions he would try to somehow promote his wares during his replies. At some point, Larp came into possession of the [[Cassus Fett's Battle Armor|battle armor]] of [[Cassus Fett]], which he sold for the price of 15,000 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]]. He may have done business with [[Revan/Legends|Revan]] during the latter's time on Dantooine.

Larp stayed on the planet even after the [[Attack on Dantooine (Jedi Civil War)|Attack on Dantooine]] and the resulting destruction of the Enclave. During the subsequent process of recovery, he ran a general store in [[Khoonda]], where he encountered and may have dealt with [[Meetra Surik]].

==Personality and traits==
{{Quote|To overcome their troubles, they must be able to defend themselves. Therefore, I shall offer the highest of quality of weapons at the lowest of the low of prices for them!|Larp to Revan|<ref name="Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic" />|translated=1}}
Larp had [[Color/Legends|black]]-colored eyes and copper-colored skin.<ref name="Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic" />

==Behind the scenes==
In ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]'', the player—as the Jedi Exile—can ask Adum Larp to join the [[Khoonda Militia]] before the [[Battle of Khoonda]], but he declines. He disappears from Khoonda after the battle, but it is not known whether or not he died during the battle.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]''
